phrases.intent_en: Are there gardens to visit in this neighbourhood?
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il des jardins à visiter dans ce quartier ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee-ah-TEEL day zhar-DAN ah vee-zee-TAY don suh kar-TYAY
phrases.cultural_note: Garavan is home to several Belle Époque villas and exotic gardens including Serre de la Madone and Val Rahmeh botanical garden.

phrases.intent_en: Is the Italian border far from here?
phrases.text_local: La frontière italienne est loin d'ici ?
phrases.pronunciation: lah fron-TYAIR ee-tah-LYEN eh LWAN dee-SEE
phrases.cultural_note: Garavan is the easternmost district of Menton, just 2km from the Italian border at Ventimiglia.

responses.english: From Garavan, the Italian border is only a 5-minute walk following the Promenade du Soleil towards Ventimiglia.
responses.phonetic: OO ay LA fron-TYAYR duh-PWEE ga-ra-VAHN
responses.french: Depuis Garavan, la frontière italienne est à seulement 5 minutes à pied en suivant la Promenade du Soleil vers Ventimiglia.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what Garavan is known for
phrases.cultural_note: Garavan is Menton's easternmost neighbourhood, bordering Italy, known for its luxury villas, exotic gardens and mild microclimate.

responses.english: For its exotic gardens and Belle Époque villas.
responses.phonetic: poor say zhar-DAN eg-zoh-TEEK ay say vee-LAH bel ay-POK.
responses.french: Pour ses jardins exotiques et ses villas Belle Époque.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how far the Italian border is from Garavan
phrases.text_local: À quelle distance se trouve la frontière italienne ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel dees-TAHNS suh TROOV lah fron-TYAIR ee-tah-LYEN

responses.english: Less than a kilometre, on foot from the station.
responses.phonetic: MWAN duhn kee-loh-MET, ah PYAY duh-PWEE lah gar.
responses.french: Moins d'un kilomètre, à pied depuis la gare.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which train goes from Garavan station to Monaco
phrases.text_local: Quel train part de Garavan vers Monaco ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel TRAN par duh gar-ah-VAHN vair moh-nah-KOH

responses.english: The TER toward Nice, stopping at Monaco-Monte-Carlo.
responses.phonetic: luh tay-uh-RAIR dee-rek-SYON NEES, ah-RAY moh-nah-KOH mon-tuh-KAR-loh.
responses.french: Le TER direction Nice, arrêt Monaco-Monte-Carlo.
